description: Final bug sweep: remove console.logs and dead code, fix hydration warnings, verify dark/light mode on all pages, check all error handling paths. Also verify favicon exists in public/.
steps: Search for and remove all console.log, console.warn, console.error statements in source files (excluding node_modules). Replace any necessary error logging with proper error boundaries or silent catch blocks.
Search for and remove dead/commented-out code blocks across all pages and components.

Audit for potential hydration mismatches: check for any usage of Date.now(), Math.random(), or window/localStorage in initial render without proper hydration guards (useEffect with mounted state). The tasks page already has some patterns - ensure consistency across all pages.

Verify dark/light mode works on all pages: ensure all color references use CSS variables (var(--text-primary), var(--surface), etc.) rather than hardcoded colors. Check for any Tailwind classes that use fixed colors without dark: variants.
Check all error handling: ensure every async function has a try/catch, every fetch has error recovery, and error states are shown to users where appropriate.
Verify favicon exists in public/favicon.ico. If missing, create a simple SVG favicon.
Verify build passes with npm run build && npm run lint.
acceptance_criteria: No console.log/warn/error statements in source code
No dead or commented-out code blocks
No hydration warnings (no unguarded client-only values in initial render)
All pages render correctly in both dark and light mode using CSS variables
All async operations have error handling
npm run build and npm run lint pass
